mission.title: cri-o: CRI-O 1.30.7 / 1.31.2: writing file devices.allow: Operation not permitted
mission.description: CRI-O 1.30.7 / 1.31.2: writing file devices.allow: Operation not permitted. Users encounter: "writing file devices.allow: Operation not permitted`".

steps.title: Identify cri-o troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your cri-o deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o -n cri-o --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `writing file devices.allow: Operation not permitted``

steps.title: Review cri-o configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant cri-o configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o
kubectl get configmap -n cri-o -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=cri-o
```
### What happened?

Upgrade from CRI-O 1.30.6 to 1.30.7 causes error for kubelet and containers are not starting:
`"Container creation error: writing file devices.allow: Operation not permitted`

As a temporary workaround downgrading CRI-O back to

steps.title: Apply the fix for CRI-O 1.30.7 / 1.31.2: writing file devices.allow:…
steps.description:
Hm, we may regressed something between v1.30.6 and v1.30.7: https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/compare/v1.30.6...v1.30.7

I'm not sure if that commit is related: https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/commit/34f2834aeb20d0ca887fec8ff2c05fbcefd80390

steps.title: Confirm CRI-O 1.30.7 / 1.31.2: writing file… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=cri-o -n cri-o --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cri-o --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `writing file devices.allow: Operation not permitted`` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary:
Hm, we may regressed something between v1.30.6 and v1.30.7: https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/compare/v1.30.6...v1.30.7

I'm not sure if that commit is related: https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/commit/34f2834aeb20d0ca887fec8ff2c05fbcefd80390
